amendatorysection.para: (1) Except as otherwise provided in this section, a violation of section 2-1103 is a Class III felony.
(2) A violation of section 2-1103 is a Class IIA felony if the violation:
(a) Involves concealment of the origin of a high-risk agricultural pathogen or pest;
(b) Is committed by a person acting on behalf of, or funded by, a foreign government; or
(c) Results in actual economic damage exceeding one million dollars.
